title: Give Elements the Right Extra Instructions
summary: Attributes add defined information or behavior to an element. Global attributes can apply broadly; element-specific attributes have narrower contracts; boolean attributes are true by presence; and enumerated attributes accept a defined vocabulary rather than arbitrary values. Predict, inspect, explain, and apply the contract in a cumulative public-information build.
objectives: Explain html attributes with source and browser evidence.
Apply html attributes without discarding earlier document work.
Diagnose the named misconception in a changed public-service scenario.

options.text: Cooling-center status board case 1: any invented attribute changes native browser behavior if its name sounds descriptive.
